hero.title: Unified Data Intelligence Platform
hero.description: A governable data intelligence foundation that brings multi-source data, business knowledge, and AI reasoning into one product for government and enterprise scenarios.

capabilities.title: An integrated product from data access to intelligent applications
capabilities.description: This first version is intentionally drafted as editable product content, ready to be replaced with real modules, terminology, and business metrics later.

items.title: Data access and governance
items.description: Connect databases, files, APIs, and business systems with standardization, quality checks, and permission isolation.

items.title: Semantic modeling and knowledge graph
items.description: Build a semantic layer around entities, relationships, metrics, and events so teams share one business language.

items.title: Intelligent analytics and Q&A
items.description: Generate conclusions for operations and governance scenarios, with natural-language retrieval and traceable explanations.

items.title: Application orchestration
items.description: Package data capabilities as reusable services for dashboards, workflow collaboration, and agent workspaces.

workflow.title: Four steps to an operational data intelligence loop
workflow.description: The product does not only display data. It connects data assets, business knowledge, analysis workflows, and application delivery into a loop that can keep evolving.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Bring together structured, unstructured, and API data.

steps.title: Model
steps.description: Define entities, relationships, metrics, and rules.

steps.title: Analyze
steps.description: Generate insights, alerts, reports, and explanations.

steps.title: Operate
steps.description: Serve the business through apps, APIs, and agents.

scenarios.title: Designed first for complex government and enterprise data scenarios
scenarios.description: This first page focuses on platform capabilities. Later, it can be split into multiple product detail pages by industry or module.

items.title: Data governance and asset inventory
items.description: Build a unified catalog, quality rules, lineage, and security classification so data is findable, trusted, and reusable.

items.title: Integrated analysis and command
items.description: Connect events, resources, locations, and operational metrics to support analysis, alerts, and dispatch decisions.

items.title: Business analytics and operational efficiency
items.description: Generate dashboards, insights, and automation suggestions across metrics, customer touchpoints, and service workflows.

cta.title: Use this page as the first product placeholder
cta.description: The content is intentionally editable. The structure is ready for real modules, cases, pricing, and demo entry points.

catalog.title: Full-stack intelligence, composable
catalog.description: From model foundations to data governance, knowledge and spatial intelligence — six platform products subscribed around plans and composed on demand; the varda assistant unlocks by plan tier.

items.name: Arda Data Intelligence Platform
items.description: The enterprise data intelligence fabric: unified governance of datasets, sources and service endpoints, with built-in quality, standards, lineage, security and MDM.
items.value: Make data governable, trustworthy and reusable — high-quality supply for every intelligent app above.

items.name: Atlas AI Model Platform
items.description: Enterprise AI model platform: multi-model access, orchestration and scheduling with unified model serving and compute management.
items.value: Turn large-model capability into a controllable, reusable model foundation.

items.name: Ontos Ontology Engine
items.description: Enterprise ontology and semantic engine: unify concepts, relations and rules into a cross-system semantic backbone.
items.value: Align terms and semantics so data and intelligence collaborate in one space.

items.name: Runa Composable Ability Platform
items.description: Composable AI ability platform: wrap models, tools and workflows into reusable ability units and orchestrate them into apps.
items.value: Assemble AI apps like building blocks — shorten the path from capability to business.

items.name: Karda Knowledge Intelligence Platform
items.description: Enterprise knowledge intelligence platform: extract, organize and retrieve knowledge into a queryable, reasoning-capable knowledge base.
items.value: Turn scattered enterprise knowledge into retrievable, reasoning-ready assets.

items.name: Terra Physical-World Intelligence
items.description: Physical-world intelligence platform: spatial data, digital twins, simulation and geo-aware agents.
items.value: Extend intelligence into the physical world for spatiotemporal analysis and digital-twin operations.

catalog.comingSoonHint: This product is under construction — stay tuned.
